hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --extract
options.description: The RegEx pattern. Only matched named group 'value' of Value will be used to replace.

options.name: --if-changed
options.description: This option indicate that tool chould update target file only if changed (slow).

arguments.name: SourceFile
arguments.description: The name of source text file.

arguments.name: DestFile
arguments.description: The name of destination text file.

arguments.name: Pattern
arguments.description: A RegEx pattern that needs to be replaced in text file.
